segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss Windows update issues, Discord problems, and technical troubleshooting

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle recounts Denver Airport experiences: bus boarding inefficiency and passenger incompetence

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle tells story about Delta flight attendant confusion over water vs. iced coffee request

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle shares workplace joke about coffee: 'it's not my cup of tea'

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss ISS decommissioning, reference frames, physics Reddit debates about pull-ups and treadmills

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss physics, Reddit, third-party apps, NYT crossword paywall, and campaign background setup

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Discussion of Notion campaign notes, previous campaign currencies, NPCs returning from campaign one

segments.label: recap
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny recaps first mega session: fire, escape, breakfast, meeting Illmari and NPCs, investigating Flynn's death, sewers, augers, recovering body, satellite dish, Zorbon meeting

segments.label: recap
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny recaps previous session: stole radar dish from roller rink, returned to Sin and Tonic, party leveled up

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss hero points, mythic points, and joke about Wheel of Fortune vowels; GM clarifies mattress history

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle wakes and goes downstairs for breakfast; Anzu asks about Fanes and hearts, rolls Arcana 20 to learn about Belvedere's multiple hearts

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses fire repellent with Ginny the heart; orders breakfast; Johnny finds ornate fans; party plans next steps and shopping

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu wants to check on twins about radar dish investigation; discusses tuning it cautiously; twins mention Sentience Distributor and Embercall

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses acquiring equipment and weapons; characters negotiate with a merchant contact and track gold/silver inventory.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss equipment purchases, armor costs, discounts, and party finances; debate plate armor affordability

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Anouk offers scrapyard work; party decides to visit Johnny's contact for armor before taking jobs

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party travels to seedier district via trolley; Anzu's raven Othello arrives; group heads to Undertable pawn shop

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party enters Undertable pawn shop; Johnny reunites with Smiler the centaur fence; Smiler offers Benny a gun

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party sells items to Smiler at pawn shop, negotiates radio price, Argyle gets new armor

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party leaves pawn shop, heads toward scrapyard, Anzu examines Benny's permission slip

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Players ask questions about their characters' backgrounds in Belvedere; GM provides lore answers about education, children, and a vaguely familiar name.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses origins and backstories; Benny reveals Pulse spoke to him, gave glowing pick

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party reacts to Benny's revelation; Argyle shows new business card, discusses parents with Scale

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party discusses glowing items from dreams, Argyle's new business cards and licensing, and Argyle's parents' names (Aaron Cross and Joran Davinrock)

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: GM narrates the party's arrival at Sableclutch Scrap, describing the neighborhood and its religious character.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: GM calls for will saves; players roll, reroll using mythic points, and discuss results with mechanical focus.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party arrives at Sableclutch Scrap, Johnny casts musical accompaniment, party discusses their recent gifts

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party meets Copperjaw, dwarven scrapyard owner; Benny shakes his hand and receives handcuffed suitcase job for 100 gold

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: NPC Copperjaw assigns delivery job with heavy magical suitcase; warns of potential ambush by interested parties.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM banter about tire companies and world-building details; off-topic tangent about Michelin and Chorath.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss tire companies, restaurant guides, and real-world examples like Denver and Michelin stars—entirely out-of-character banter.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Copperjaw gives Diamond District address, Johnny prestidigitates party clean, confirms doorman details and payment

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party negotiates payment details with Copperjaw, discusses the briefcase delivery job, and prepares to leave the junkyard

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Discussion of Anzu's animal companion's perception modifier and mechanics of an ability allowing one-minute eye-contact viewing once per ten minutes.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Players announce they're stepping away to use the restroom during the campaign session.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss character identities and backstories out of character, joking about Benny's character being a pug

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party walks through town while Johnny questions Benny about entertainment; GM describes perception checks and suspicious figure following them.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: GM narrates party's journey, describes attention drawn by Benny's suitcase, and players establish marching order for continued travel.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM discuss character appearance and race in a lighthearted meta conversation about a character's elven features.

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Goblin pickpocket attempts to steal from Johnny, party pursues, then Black Line cops approach after commotion

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu's bird Othello spots two Blackline cops approaching; they're not Threshold Authority.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny persuades cops to pursue pickpocket; gives contact info via Copperjaw at Sableclutch scrap.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle and Anzu scout for threats; cops position themselves to box in the party.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle questions cops' ID; they mention delivery job and leave after exchanging names.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party debates attacking cops; Othello follows cops who vanish; group heads to trolley station.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Othello scouts the area and loses sight of the cops; party makes it back to the trolley station without incident.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party arrives at trolley station and waits for train; GM calls for perception check.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Rules discussion about vehicle costs, transport between city areas, and slide device mechanics.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party arrives at trolley station; perceives waiting passengers; tram arrives and doors open.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party boards tram; Benny sits by window; Argyle attempts to talk to other passengers.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle makes society check on passengers; learns they're factory workers and lost tourists.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Tram moves to Void 2; more passengers board; Johnny spots goblin factory worker eyeing briefcase.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party boards tram, GM describes passengers; Argyle guards child; more passengers board at next stops

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Tram moves to Void 2; more passengers board; Johnny spots goblin factory worker eyeing briefcase.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny gives orders to spread a message and keep watch on Anaïs; Benny comments on private trams.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Tram reaches destination; party disembarks; GM offers taxi or walking; party decides to walk

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party checks for followers, finds none; routes through alleys toward destination; GM describes path options

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party walks through alley; two office workers transform into fleshy creatures; combat imminent

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Initiative rolled; rules discussion on rune progression and weapon bonuses; Argyle and Benny attack creatures; combat begins

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Benny intimidates Ugathal I, Ugathal II attacks Argyle and grabs him, Benny interrupts with opportunity attack

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Johnny casts Courageous Anthem and Soothe, demoralizes Ugathal II, recites melancholy library poem

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Anzu recalls knowledge on creatures, casts Telekinetic Rend on both Ugathals, shields herself

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Argyle strikes Ugathal I twice, treats wounds with critical success, gains mythic point back

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Benny kills Ugathal I with intimidating strike, Ugathal II attempts blood nourishment but gets interrupted by Johnny

segments.label: combat
segments.oneLineSummary: Combat continues: Johnny uses distracting performance, Anzu attacks with telekinetic projectile, Argyle finishes off the Ugathal with a great axe strike.

segments.label: ic
segments.oneLineSummary: Party searches the Ugathal corpses, finds two black line badges inside the flesh.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players and GM banter about adding 'Agent of' to business cards and joking about fraud.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Post-combat discussion: players and GM discuss enemy stats, crit rolls, weapon builds, and reactive strike mechanics in a casual, joking tone.

segments.label: rules
segments.oneLineSummary: Rules discussion: weapon potency benefits for spellcasters, armor potency from explorer's clothing, hand wraps for unarmed strikes.

segments.label: ooc
segments.oneLineSummary: Players discuss scheduling (Johnny to Japan, Anzu to Italy, Argyle's wedding), Johnny's book manuscript, and say goodbyes.
